name: property managers managing 5–15 properties tool
description: For property managers managing 5–15 properties, inefficient scheduling causes missed inspections. We provide a streamlined scheduling system instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or paper logs.
problem_solved: Inefficient scheduling and logging of maintenance tasks
